about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Learn more about our institution
about.heroDescription: Illuminating minds and shaping futures since 1995. Where excellence meets innovation, and every student discovers their limitless potential.
about.missionText: To provide exceptional education that empowers students to become confident, compassionate, and capable individuals who contribute positively to society. We strive to create a nurturing environment where every student can discover their potential and achieve academic excellence through innovative teaching and personalized learning experiences.
about.visionText: To be a leading educational institution recognized for academic excellence, innovative teaching methods, and holistic development of students. We envision a future where our graduates become leaders, innovators, and responsible citizens who make meaningful contributions to their communities and the world.

legacy.title: Our Legacy of Excellence
legacy.subtitle: Three decades of commitment to educational excellence and student success

1995.title: 1995: Humble Beginnings
1995.text: Founded with a vision to provide quality education to 50 local students, starting in a modest building with dedicated educators.

2010.title: 2010: Expansion & Growth
2010.text: Expanded to serve over 500 students with new facilities, advanced curriculum, and modern teaching methodologies.

2024.title: 2024: Excellence Today
2024.text: A comprehensive educational center serving 1,000+ students with cutting-edge technology and innovative programs.

journey.title: Our Journey
journey.text: Over the past three decades, Sunlight School has evolved from a small community school into a beacon of educational excellence. We've maintained our commitment to quality while embracing modern teaching methodologies and technological advancements.

programs.title: Comprehensive Academic Programs
programs.subtitle: From foundation to advanced learning, we offer complete educational pathways

primary.title: Primary Education
primary.desc: Comprehensive foundation program for grades K-5, focusing on core subjects and fundamental skills development through play-based learning.

middle.title: Middle School
middle.desc: Advanced curriculum for grades 6-8, preparing students for high school with specialized subjects and extracurricular activities.

high.title: High School
high.desc: College preparatory program for grades 9-12, offering advanced placement courses and comprehensive career guidance.

achievements.sportsDesc: State champions in basketball and soccer

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.text: We strive for the highest standards in education, fostering a culture of continuous improvement and achievement in everything we do.

compassion.title: Compassion
compassion.text: We create a caring and supportive environment where every student feels valued, respected, and empowered to reach their full potential.

community.title: Community
community.text: We build strong partnerships with parents, staff, and the community to support student success and foster lifelong learning.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about Sunlight School

q1.question: How do I apply for admission?
q1.answer: Contact our admissions office at (555) 123-4568 or email admissions@sunlightschool.edu. We'll guide you through the application process and schedule a campus visit.

q2.question: What are the school hours?
q2.answer: Regular school hours are 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM, Monday through Friday. Saturday sessions run from 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM for special programs.

q3.question: Do you offer transportation?
q3.answer: Yes, we provide safe and reliable transportation services for students within a 20-mile radius. Contact our transportation office for routes and schedules.

q4.question: What extracurricular activities are available?
q4.answer: We offer a wide range of activities including sports teams, arts programs, clubs, and community service opportunities. Visit our activities page for details.
